login.requestAccessSubtitle: Enter your email to request access. We will send you the credentials once your request is approved.

about.title: SKINHOLDER
about.subtitle: Technical tracking of CS2 skin investments
about.whatIsDescription: SkinHolder is an analysis and tracking tool for Counter-Strike 2 investments. It is specifically designed to manage skins, cases, stickers, and capsules held in inventory long-term. It provides detailed metrics, price histories, and profitability analysis for investors looking to maximize the value of their digital assets.
about.feature1: Historical price analysis and market trends
about.feature2: Automatic ROI and profitability calculation per item
about.architectureDesc: Three-tier client-server architecture with multiple frontends:
about.backendDesc: RESTful API in .NET 8 with Clean Architecture, implementing the Repository pattern, Entity Framework Core, AutoMapper for DTO mapping, JWT authentication, and Rate Limiting.
about.databaseDesc: MySQL 8.0 with optimized indexes for high-performance queries on price histories.
